visa_types.name: Transit : 48 hours
visa_types.documents_required:
- Valid Visa: Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country they are traveling to from the UAE.
- Visa Application form duly filled*
- Confirmed Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow. 
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Passport Front/External Cover page and Bio page (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Individual applicants aged between 18 and 41 years, or those traveling with family, must provide a 6-month COLOURED bank statement showing a minimum closing balance of USD 4,000 for last 2 months under single bank account in applicants’ name. Highlight the balance amount in yellow along with the name of the applicant.
- A valid confirmed Hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets).
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Duration of stay : 48 hours]

Express Visa Fees

[Table:   Duration of stay : 48 hours]
- Kindly Note:The above visa is valid for a period of 30 days from the date of issue.
- (Transit: 48 hours, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax).
- M-Pesa payment of fees should only be made at Visa Application Centre after completion of documents check by the Counter Staff. Please do not make any payments at the bank.
- Please Note:The cancellation charge per visa is 5651 (KES) Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
- *Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances.
visa_types.processing_time:
Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

Express Visa Processing Time: Within 48 hours from the time of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
48 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 48 hours stay (As per flight schedule - Arrival/departure time in Dubai). This is Single Entry visa. Ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 48 Hours. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. The entry validity of the visa is for 30 days from the date of issue.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
48 Hours Visa: This Visa is valid only for 48 hours stay (As per flight schedule - Arrival/departure time in Dubai). This is Single Entry visa. Ideal for travellers to the UAE who plan to stay for a period of less than 48 Hours. This type of Visa is preferred by travellers having business meetings or taking stopovers en route to their onward journey. The entry validity of the visa is for 30 days from the date of issue.

## Visa Fees

[Table:   Duration of stay : 48 hours]

Express Visa Fees

[Table:   Duration of stay : 48 hours]
- Kindly Note:The above visa is valid for a period of 30 days from the date of issue.
- (Transit: 48 hours, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax).
- M-Pesa payment of fees should only be made at Visa Application Centre after completion of documents check by the Counter Staff. Please do not make any payments at the bank.
- Please Note:The cancellation charge per visa is 5651 (KES) Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
- *Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstances.

## Mandatory documents
- Valid Visa: Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country they are traveling to from the UAE.
- Visa Application form duly filled*
- Confirmed Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow. 
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Passport Front/External Cover page and Bio page (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Individual applicants aged between 18 and 41 years, or those traveling with family, must provide a 6-month COLOURED bank statement showing a minimum closing balance of USD 4,000 for last 2 months under single bank account in applicants’ name. Highlight the balance amount in yellow along with the name of the applicant.
- A valid confirmed Hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets).
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.

## Application Form
Click here to download the Visa Application Form.
Instruction 
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill all the details as mentioned in the form 
- Submit it with the mandatory documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form: 
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

Express Visa Processing Time: Within 48 hours from the time of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

## Eligibility Criteria
Criteria I: Travel Record
Applicants who have travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan.

Supporting documents required:
- Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport.
Criteria II: Financial Record
- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Income Tax Returns(IT)- Applicants are required to submit the KRA (Kenya Revenue Authority) PIN certificate for past 02 years.
Or
- Salary Certificate/ Letter of Employment- Employed individuals needs to submit salary slips of last 03 months (should be above KES 125,000 per month), company covering letter confirming the employment with designation and that leave has been approved for the period of stay in UAE – stamped and signed by HR Manager.
Or
- Business owner- Turnover for past 2 years - Applicants should submit the Company Registration Certificate (CR12), the Certificate of Incorporation, company financial statements (Annual business turnover of KES 5 million – 10 million or higher, bank statements to support it) and the company’s KRA (Kenya Revenue Authority) PIN certificate.

Criteria III: Invitation from immediate family member residing in UAE on family status
Supporting documents required:

- Valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host. **Host should have an apartment with two or more bedrooms.
- Relationship with the Host.
- UAE resident card of the Host.

Newly Married Couple: In case of the spouse’s name not endorsed on the passport;

Supporting documents required:
- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple.

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary.
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

visa_types.name: Tourist : 60 days
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa Application form duly filled*
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Passport Front/External Cover page and Bio page (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Individual applicants aged between 18 and 41 years, or those traveling with family, must provide a 6-month COLOURED bank statement showing a minimum closing balance of USD 4,000 for last 2 months under single bank account in applicants’ name. Highlight the balance amount in yellow along with the name of the applicant.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period. For 60-day single entry visa, Hotel booking should be 31days or more.
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
60 days Visit Visa (Tourist): The entry validity for all types of tourist visa is 58 days from the date of issue (Valid until date mentioned on visa).
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended twice for 30days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
- Please contact the below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with the original passport and extension fee, once you have entered the country on the same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services

Dubai International Airport

Terminal 3- Arrival Area

Next to Boots Pharmacy
- Work Timings: 24/7 from Monday to Sunday.

- Select Save Target As from the list

## Processing Time

visa_types.processing_time: Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Multi Entry Short Term Visa - 30 Days : This is a multiple entry visa and the first entry in UAE should be made within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 30 days. Within the period of these 30 days applicant can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However, applicant should make sure his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 30th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended thrice for 30days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact the below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with the original passport and extension fee, once you have entered the country on the same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
        Dubai International Airport
         Terminal 3- Arrival Area
      Next to Boots Pharmacy.
- Work Timings: 24/7 from Monday to Sunday.

visa_types.name: Transit : 96 Hours
visa_types.documents_required:
- Valid Visa: Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country they are traveling to from the UAE.
- Visa Application form duly filled*
- Confirmed onward/return ticket copy of Emirates airline highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Passport Front/External Cover page and Bio page (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Individual applicants aged between 18 and 41 years, or those traveling with family, must provide a 6-month COLOURED bank statement showing a minimum closing balance of USD 4,000 for last 2 months under single bank account in applicants’ name. Highlight the balance amount in yellow along with the name of the applicant.
- A valid confirmed Hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets).
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.
- Confirmed Onward or return ticket copy of Emirates or Fly Dubai airline. **
- 1 coloured passport size Photograph **
- Coloured photocopy of the Passport (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel)
- Note: At the time of entry, the passenger must prove that they have enough financial resources to cover their expenses during the trip and a confirmed hotel booking**
For other supporting documents please go to Eligibility Criteria

- Coloured photocopy of the Passport Front/External Cover page and Bio page (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Individual applicants aged between 18 and 41 years, or those traveling with family, must provide a 6-month COLOURED bank statement showing a minimum closing balance of USD 4,000 for last 2 months under single bank account in applicants’ name. Highlight the balance amount in yellow along with the name of the applicant.
- A valid confirmed Hotel booking. Applicant’s name and check-in/out dates highlighted in yellow (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets).
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.
- Confirmed Onward or return ticket copy of Emirates or Fly Dubai airline. **
- 1 coloured passport size Photograph **
- Coloured photocopy of the Passport (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel)
- Note: At the time of entry, the passenger must prove that they have enough financial resources to cover their expenses during the trip and a confirmed hotel booking**
For other supporting documents please go to Eligibility Criteria

## Application Form
Click here to download the Visa Application Form.
Instructions:
- The form needs to be filled offline.
- You are required to fill all the details as mentioned in the form.
- Submit it with the mandatory documents at your nearest visa application centre.
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link.
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list.
- Save the form on your computer.

## Processing Time
Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

Express Visa Processing Time: Within 48 hours from the time of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).

## Eligibility Criteria
Criteria I: Travel Record
Applicants who have travelled at least once in the last 02 years to or has a valid visa for countries like USA, UK, Schengen countries, European Union, Australia, New Zealand, Russia, Canada and Japan.

Supporting documents required:
- Pages exhibiting the evidence of the travel and Visa in current or previous Passport.
Criteria II: Financial Record
- Security Deposit equivalent to USD 1000 (Refundable upon return and after producing the entry & exit stamp in UAE).
- Income Tax Returns(IT)- Applicants are required to submit the KRA (Kenya Revenue Authority) PIN certificate for past 02 years.
Or
- Salary Certificate/ Letter of Employment- Employed individuals needs to submit salary slips of last 03 months (should be above KES 125,000 per month), company covering letter confirming the employment with designation and that leave has been approved for the period of stay in UAE – stamped and signed by HR Manager.
Or
- Business owner- Turnover for past 2 years - Applicants should submit the Company Registration Certificate (CR12), the Certificate of Incorporation, company financial statements (Annual business turnover of KES 5 million – 10 million or higher, bank statements to support it) and the company’s KRA (Kenya Revenue Authority) PIN certificate.
Criteria III: Invitation from immediate family member residing in UAE on family status

Supporting documents required:
- Valid tenancy contract /Ejari or title deed of the host. **Host should have an apartment with two or more bedrooms.
- Relationship with the Host.
- UAE resident card of the Host
.Newly Married Couple: In case of the spouse’s name not endorsed on the passport;
Supporting documents required:
- Marriage Certificate / Notarised Affidavit.
- Newly married couples traveling immediately after marriage are required to submit NOC from parents with photo id proof, Wedding card and Marriage photograph of the couple.

Important Information:
- Selection / determination of a visa category are based on Emirates ticket itinerary.
- Emirates regret its inability to sponsor unaccompanied minors and students. Dubai immigration will consider applications from minors and students only if they are travelling with parents.

visa_types.name: Multi Entry Long Term Visa : 60 Days
visa_types.documents_required:
- Visa Application form duly filled*
- Confirmed Return/Onward Emirates ticket, highlighting the applicant's name, entry and exit from the UAE in yellow.
- A coloured recent passport-size photograph with a white background, must be front-facing and measure 2 × 2 inches, clear, sharp, with adequate brightness and contrast, without any colour filter, showing a close-up of the head and partial shoulders with the face centred and a neutral expression, fully visible from forehead to chin with eyes open, without hair or frames covering the face, against a plain white shadow-free background. Polaroid photos or those printed on ordinary printers are not accepted.
- Coloured photocopy of the Passport Front/External Cover page and Bio page (Valid for minimum period of 6 months at the time of travel). Passports containing special characters such as brackets in the name will not be accepted and must be amended prior to visa submission.
- Applicants must provide a valid visa for the destination country travelling to or arriving from the UAE.
- Individual applicants aged between 18 and 41 years, or those traveling with family, must provide a 6-month COLOURED bank statement showing a minimum closing balance of USD 4,000 for last 2 months under single bank account in applicants’ name. Highlight the balance amount in yellow along with the name of the applicant.
- Confirmed hotel voucher with confirmation number, applicant's name, check-in, check-out dates highlighted in yellow for the entire stay. (Check- in, Check- out dates on the hotel confirmation must match the dates on flight tickets). Note that only up to two hotel bookings are allowed for the entire stay period.
- Coloured photocopy of a valid visa or residence proof if the Nationality is different from the Country of Residence.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[Table:   Multi Entry Long Term Visa : 60 Days]
- Kindly note:The above visa is valid for a period of 58 days from the date of issue.
- (Transit: 60 days, Visa fees inclusive of service charge and tax).
- M-Pesa payment of fees should only be made at Visa Application Centre after completion of documents check by the Counter Staff. Please do not make any payments at the bank.
- Please Note:The cancellation charge per visa is 5651 (KES) Cancellation request can be raised with the application centre where you have submitted the visa application and for applications that are approved.
- * Visa fee once paid is not refundable under any circumstance.
visa_types.processing_time: Normal Visa Processing Time: 5 – 6 working days from the date of submission (Excluding Saturday, Sunday and any UAE Holiday).
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Multi Entry Long Term Visa 60 Days : This is a multiple entry visa and the first entry in UAE should be made within validity period of 58 days (valid until date mentioned on visa). With effect from the date of FIRST entry visa is valid for 60 days. Within the period of these 60 days applicant can make multiple entries / exits to / from UAE. However, applicant should make sure his/her last exit from UAE should be on or before 60th day.
After entry in Dubai stay validity of visa can be extended twice for 30days each. Extension fee is AED 850 each time.
Please contact the below mentioned address before expiry of stay validity along with the original passport and extension fee, once you have entered the country on the same visa.
- Emirates Commercial Visa Services
Dubai International Airport
Terminal 3- Arrival Area
Next to Boots Pharmacy.
- Work Timings: 24/7 from Monday to Sunday.
